title: AsyncApiServiceModel
content:
# AsyncApiServiceModel

Inherits from: BaseModel


API Service Model base-class.


## Methods


### async scan(client: Optional[AsyncBaseClient], path: str, api_response: Any, flatten: bool, method: str, data: Any) -> AsyncIterator[Any]

Iterate pages.


### async fetch(client: Optional[AsyncBaseClient], path: str, api_response: Any, method: str, data: Any) -> Sequence[Any]

Fetch all data.

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client()
result = client.base.api_service_model.scan()
